description: Battle-tested evals for Contextia MCP skill. Covers: triggering accuracy, tool routing, anti-pattern avoidance, workflow correctness, token efficiency, new tools (code/knowledge/introspect), error handling, and end-to-end real-world scenarios.

categories.triggering: Skill loads on relevant queries, does NOT load on unrelated ones
categories.routing: Correct tool selected for each task type
categories.workflow: Multi-step workflows execute in correct order
categories.token_efficiency: Agent uses compact tools instead of verbose alternatives
categories.new_tools: code, knowledge, introspect tools used correctly

evals.name: trigger-index-project
evals.prompt: Index this project at /Users/alice/platform so I can search it.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent calls index('/Users/alice/platform'), then polls status() until indexed: true.

assertions.text: index() is called with the correct path
assertions.passing_condition: index tool is called with path='/Users/alice/platform' or equivalent

assertions.text: Agent polls status() after index, does not immediately search
assertions.passing_condition: status() is called after index() before any search/find_symbol call

evals.name: trigger-search-codebase
evals.prompt: Search the codebase for how rate limiting is implemented.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent calls search('rate limiting implementation') as first action.

assertions.text: search() is called as the first code intelligence action
assertions.passing_condition: search tool is called, not grep or readFile

assertions.text: find_callers() is called
assertions.passing_condition: find_callers('authenticate') or find_callers with authenticate is called

evals.name: trigger-what-breaks
evals.prompt: What breaks if I change the TokenBudget class?

assertions.text: impact() is called before suggesting any changes
assertions.passing_condition: impact('TokenBudget') is called

evals.name: trigger-explain-symbol
evals.prompt: Explain how the IndexingPipeline class works.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent calls explain('IndexingPipeline'), not readFile.

assertions.text: explain() is called
assertions.passing_condition: explain('IndexingPipeline') is called

assertions.text: Agent does NOT read the source file first
assertions.passing_condition: No readFile on pipeline.py before explain is called

evals.name: trigger-git-history
evals.prompt: When was the warm-start feature added and who added it?
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent calls commit_search('warm start auto restore index').

assertions.text: commit_search() is called with a relevant query
assertions.passing_condition: commit_search is called with a query about warm start or auto-restore

assertions.text: Agent does NOT run git log shell commands
assertions.passing_condition: No git log shell command before commit_search

evals.name: trigger-remember-context
evals.prompt: Remember that we use JWT with 24h expiry and refresh tokens stored in Redis.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent calls remember() with the content.

assertions.text: remember() is called with the JWT context
assertions.passing_condition: remember tool is called with content about JWT

evals.name: trigger-session-recovery
evals.prompt: My context was just compacted. What was I working on?
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent calls session_snapshot() first, then recall() if needed.

assertions.text: session_snapshot() is called
assertions.passing_condition: session_snapshot is called as the first action

evals.name: no-trigger-weather
evals.prompt: What's the weather in San Francisco today?
evals.expected_behavior: Skill does NOT load. Agent answers directly without using Contextia tools.

assertions.text: No Contextia tools are called
assertions.passing_condition: No search, find_symbol, index, or other Contextia tool is called

evals.name: no-trigger-write-poem
evals.prompt: Write me a haiku about autumn leaves.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill does NOT load. Agent writes the haiku directly.

assertions.text: No Contextia tools are called
assertions.passing_condition: No Contextia tool is invoked

evals.name: no-trigger-edit-known-file
evals.prompt: Add a comment to line 42 of src/config.py explaining the timeout value.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill does NOT load for a single-file edit where the file and line are already known. Agent reads and edits the file directly.

assertions.text: Agent edits the file directly without searching first
assertions.passing_condition: Agent reads src/config.py and makes the edit without calling search or find_symbol first

evals.name: routing-overview-not-ls
evals.prompt: Give me a high-level overview of this codebase — languages, file count, main modules.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls overview(), not ls or glob.

assertions.text: overview() is called
assertions.passing_condition: overview() is called

assertions.text: Agent does NOT use ls, glob, or listDirectory
assertions.passing_condition: No shell ls or glob call before overview

assertions.text: Response includes language breakdown and directory structure
assertions.passing_condition: Response includes specific language percentages or file counts from overview output

evals.name: routing-find-symbol-not-grep
evals.prompt: Where is the RateLimiter class defined?

assertions.text: find_symbol() is called
assertions.passing_condition: find_symbol('RateLimiter') is called

assertions.text: Agent does NOT grep for the class name
assertions.passing_condition: No grep or shell search command before find_symbol

evals.name: routing-architecture-for-layers
evals.prompt: What are the main architectural layers of this project?
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls architecture(), not overview() or reading multiple files.

assertions.text: architecture() is called
assertions.passing_condition: architecture() is called

assertions.text: Response includes layers, entry points, or hub symbols
assertions.passing_condition: Response mentions specific layers or entry points from architecture output

evals.name: routing-analyze-for-smells
evals.prompt: Are there any code quality issues in the src/auth directory?
evals.expected_behavior: Agent calls analyze(path='src/auth'), not reading all files manually.

assertions.text: analyze() is called with a scoped path
assertions.passing_condition: analyze(path='src/auth') or analyze with a path containing 'auth' is called

assertions.text: Agent does NOT read all files in src/auth manually
assertions.passing_condition: No readFile loop over auth directory files before analyze
